headline: Truist Securities Maintains Buy on Mid-America Apartment, Lowers Price Target to $136
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Michael Lewis   maintains Mid-America Apartment (NYSE:MAA) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $142 to $136.
